titleStmt.title: SII 17.711: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 711. (A.R. No. 654 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of the date given, viz., Makara and Rōhiṇi are insufficient for verification.

This inscription records the sale of the right of worship and other services, for 20 days in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-uḍaiyār by certain śivabrāhmaṇas of Nāṛpattiraṇḍu vaṭṭam of the temple to the śivabrāhmaṇa Agavalan Śūriya Bhaṭṭaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīviranāraciṅka tevar yātavarāyaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 6 vatu
makara nāyiṟu rocaṇināḷ tirukkārikarai Uṭaiya nāyinār koyil civappirāmaṇar Aga valaṉ
cūriya paṭṭaṉukku Ik koyilil 4 10 2 vaṭṭattu Eḻuttuṭṭa pramāṇattup
paṭi koṇṭa nāḷ 10 Innāḷ pattukku paṉmāyecura paṭṭaṉ viṟṟa ṉāḷ 3i
tevakaṉmi peruṅkap piḷḷai viṟṟa
ṉāḷ 3i Aṉpa nāyakaṉ viṟṟa nāḷ 1
Āṇṭāṉ paṭṭaṉ viṟṟa nāḷ 2i
Āka nāḷ pattu AraiThis word is engraved in a different hand and appears to have been inserted to justify the discrepancy in the total. .
Digital edition of SII 17.711 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
